skill.summary: DeFi Yield optimizer - cross-protocol yield comparison, auto-rebalancing, best yield farming strategies. Each call charges 0.001 USDT via SkillPay.

latestVersion.changelog:
- Improved English description and added more tags for discoverability.
- Added a homepage link and basic environment variable requirement metadata for SkillPay integration.
- Significantly expanded the list of triggers to cover more search terms.
- Added a sample output section and clarified pricing for better usability.
- Updated risk disclosure and investment advice.
